title: Mercari India - Software Engineer, Frontend ( 2-8 yrs )
description:
**Job Description**
 About Us
   

  

 Mercari is a Japan\\-based C2C marketplace company founded in 2013 with the mission to "Create value in a global marketplace where anyone can buy \\& sell." From being the first tech unicorn from Japan before its IPO in 2018 we have come a long way towards becoming a global player and continuously and diligently work towards our transformation journey with a strong focus on our mission.
   

  

 Since its inception, Mercari Group has worked to grow its services, investing in both our people and technology. Over time Mercari has expanded from being the top player in the C2C marketplace in Japan to new geographies like the U.S. We have also successfully launched new businesses such as Merpay, which is a mobile payment service platform with a vision to create a society where anyone can realize their dreams through a new ecosystem centered not only on payment service but also on credit. Today, Mercari Group is made up of multiple subsidiary businesses including logistics, B2C platform, blockchain, and sports team management.
   

  

**About Mercari India**
 Established in Bangalore in 2022, Mercari India serves as a crucial technology hub for the Mercari Group. Leveraging the rich and diverse tech talent in India, we primarily collaborate closely with our development hub in Japan to drive engineering development for Mercari's applications. Having grown to an organization of approximately 80 members over about three years since its inception, Mercari India aims to evolve into an even stronger engineering organization that spearheads technological innovation for the entire group. This will be achieved by further enhancing our engineering capabilities and promoting AI initiatives that reflect India's cutting\\-edge technology and knowledge.
   

  

 Work Responsibilities
   

  

* What You'll Do:
* Languages: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript(ES6\\), TypeScript, Reactjs, Next.js, GraphQL, Apollo Client, Redux, Cypress, Rendertron and Storybook
* Infrastructures: Google Cloud Platform (Compute Engine, Kubernetes Engine, App Engine)
* Configuration management tool: Terraform
* Other: Circle CI, GitHub, Slack, JIRA, Spinnaker and Datadog


**Requirements**
 Minimum Requirements
   

  

* Shared understanding and belief in Mercari Group's mission and values
* At least 2\\-8 years of experience in development related to frontend fields such as web browsers, JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js and Redux
* Experience with developing and operating large\\-scale products
* Ability to design and develop with performance and scalability in mind
* Ability to use HTML and CSS to develop solid user interfaces
* Knowledge of JavaScript and experience developing with UI libraries or frameworks such as React
* Strong understanding of cross browser compatibility and best practices
* Understanding of version management and ability to participate in development via Git
* Effective communication skills, needed for product development with team members and with other teams


**Preferred Requirements**
* Extensive knowledge of standard web technologies and specialized knowledge in some areas, like TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Redux
* Understanding of the characteristics of different libraries/frameworks and the ability to introduce them to projects where necessary
* Ability to design architecture based on the characteristics of the app
* Ability to consistently take initiative in implementing improvements to the app
* Cloud development experience (preferably GCP or AWS)
* Experience contributing to an open\\-source project
* Familiarity with CI systems and the release process


 Related Articles
   

  

* Mercari is establishing a new Center of Excellence in Bengaluru, India this summer! \\#Mercariindia \\#MercariDays \\| mercan (????)
* CEO Shintaro Yamada Tells of the Circular Economy Mercari Has Always Aimed to Achieve
* Mercari's Role as a Startup Hiring Indian Engineers Highlighted as Japan's Speaker of the House of Representatives Visits Mercari's India Office, Meets with India PM Modi \\- Mercari India


**Benefits**
 Employment Status
   

  

 Full\\-time
   

  

 Office
   

  

 Bangalore
   

  

 Hybrid Workstyle
   

  

 We believe in high performance and professionalism. We work from office for 2 days/week and work from home 3 days/week
   

  

 To build a strong \\& highly\\-engaged organization in India, we highly encourage everyone to work from our Bangalore office, especially during the initial office setup phase
   

  

 We will continue to review and update the policy to address future organizational needs
   

  

 Work Hours: Full flextime (no core time)
   

  

* Flexible to choose working hours other than team common meetings


**Qualifications**
 Minimum Requirements
   

  

* Shared understanding and belief in Mercari Group's mission and values
* At least 2\\-8 years of experience in development related to frontend fields such as web browsers, JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js and Redux
* Experien


**Requirements**
* Extensive knowledge of standard web technologies and specialized knowledge in some areas, like TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Redux
* Understanding of the characteristics of different libraries/frameworks and the ability to introduce them


**Company Description**
 Launched in 2013 and becoming the first Unicorn company in Japan, Mercari Group is a Japan\\-based corporate group operating in both Japan and the US. Our mission is to create value in a global marketplace where everyone can buy and sell.
   

  

 Mercari is the largest marketplace platform with over 20 million monthly users in Japan. Through the Mercari app, users can sell their used or unwanted items to those who need them just by taking a photo and entering in some basic information. We are constantly developing our app to provide an environment where anyone can conduct transactions easily, safely, and securely. As part of these efforts, we have invested in the latest technologies such as AI and machine learning, and have released various functions such as escrow payment, AI listing, and barcode listing.
   

  

 The app currently operates in Japan and the US, with 5\\.6 million monthly users in the US (as of 2022\\.3\\).
   

  

 We have also successfully launched new businesses such as our mobile payment service Merpay. Today, Mercari Group is made up of multiple subsidiary businesses, including those involved in logistics, B2C e\\-commerce, blockchain, and sports team management.
   

  

 Mercari India located in Bengaluru will harness the infinite power of technology to create high\\-quality service where our people come together to build products that will further strengthen our leadership position in a global product market.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
**Company Description** 




 Headcount is an AI\\-powered agent integrated into Slack and Teams, designed to streamline workplace communication and operations. By connecting time off, workload, 1:1s, feedback, pulse, and recognition into a single conversation, Headcount delivers timely and actionable insights. Users can easily ask questions and receive a full overview or rely on the AI to proactively notify them of important updates. Headcount's intuitive approach helps teams work more effectively while staying informed and engaged.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role based in Bengaluru for a Software Engineer Intern. In this role, you will assist in developing and maintaining the back\\-end infrastructure, participate in programming tasks, and work on software development projects under the guidance of senior engineers. You will also have the opportunity to contribute to the overall product design and development process while gaining hands\\-on experience in a dynamic environment.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Strong foundation in Computer Science concepts
* Knowledge of Back\\-End Web Development and Software Development methodologies
* Proficiency in Programming, including experience with Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP)
* Effective problem\\-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team
* Eagerness to learn and apply new technologies in a real\\-world setting
* Pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience with Node.js, Python, Go, or similar back\\-end technologies
* Familiarity with REST APIs, databases (SQL/NoSQL), and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)
* Exposure to Slack/Teams app development or chatbot frameworks
* Interest in AI/ML, LLMs, or agent\\-based systems
* Active GitHub profile or open\\-source contributions
* Perks \\& Benefits
* We believe interns should be treated like full team members. Here's what you get:



  





 Perks:
 


* Competitive Stipend: ₹75,000 per month
* Unlimited PTO: Take time off when you need it — we trust you to manage your own balance
* Swiggy Food Coupons: Monthly meal credits so working from home never means cooking from scratch
* Annual Offsite: One fully\\-sponsored team offsite each year to bond, brainstorm, and recharge
* Fully Remote: Work from anywhere with flexible hours that respect your timezone
* Home Office Setup: One\\-time stipend to set up your remote workstation
* Learning \\& Development: Annual budget for courses, books, and conferences
* Health \\& Wellness: Health insurance coverage and mental wellness support
* Mentorship: Direct mentorship from senior engineers and weekly 1:1s with your manager
* PPO Opportunity: High\\-performing interns are considered for full\\-time roles upon completion



  





 How to Apply
 



 Send us your resume along with a short note about a project you're proud of and a link to your GitHub or portfolio. We review every application personally.
 



  





 Headcount is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all team members.

title: Software Engineer - Backend (Data Platform)
description:

 In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, building, and maintaining scalable micro\\-services, ETL pipelines and databases that power our VWO reporting. The ideal candidate will bring hands\\-on experience with modern backend technologies and cloud\\-based architectures, along with a strong capacity for learning and adapting to evolving business needs.

* Build and manage cloud\\-native applications leveraging Google Cloud Platform (GCP), including Google Cloud Storage (GCS).

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and software engineering through innovative research and development. Renowned for its commitment to excellence and cutting\\-edge solutions, Turing specializes in building scalable AI systems that revolutionize the way developers and organizations approach software development. With a global presence and a diverse team of experts, Turing continuously pushes the boundaries of what is possible in AI and machine learning, fostering an environment that encourages innovation, collaboration, and growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role is pivotal in developing datasets that enable LLMs to effectively address realistic software engineering problems. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in working with high\\-quality public GitHub repositories, contributing to the automation of development environments, and assessing code quality. You will play a crucial role in analyzing open\\-source projects, triaging issues, and evaluating test coverage to support our innovative research initiatives. This position offers an excellent opportunity to lead technical efforts, collaborate with researchers, and influence the future of AI\\-assisted software development.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Candidates should possess a minimum of three years of comprehensive experience in software engineering, with a demonstrated ability to work with complex codebases. Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby is essential, along with strong skills in Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup. Experience in navigating, modifying, and testing real\\-world projects locally is required. Familiarity with open\\-source contributions, either through participation or evaluation, is considered a plus. Additionally, candidates should have excellent problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently or lead a team of junior engineers.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues from GitHub repositories across trending open\\-source projects to identify areas for evaluation and improvement.
* Set up, configure, and automate development environments, including Dockerization and environment management.
* Assess and improve unit test coverage and overall code quality to ensure robustness and reliability.
* Modify and run codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code understanding scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to identify repositories and issues that present challenges for LLMs, aiding in dataset expansion and validation.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering teamwork and technical excellence in project execution.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers the opportunity to work remotely from anywhere in the world, providing flexibility and work\\-life balance. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization engaged in cutting\\-edge AI research, with access to ongoing learning and development opportunities. Turing values its employees and provides a collaborative environment where innovative ideas are encouraged and recognized. Additionally, you will have the chance to work on impactful projects that shape the future of AI and software engineering, collaborating with some of the top minds in the industry.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive environment where diversity is celebrated and everyone is treated with respect. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team drives innovation and excellence, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to apply and contribute to our mission of transforming AI and software engineering.

This role involves designing, building, and deploying scalable machine learning models that address real\\-world challenges. As a remote position based in India, this role requires effective collaboration with cross\\-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and product managers. The successful candidate will play a crucial part in developing reliable, production\\-ready solutions that drive business value and enhance our technological capabilities.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Machine Learning, or a related field. They should have between 2 to 5 years of experience working in machine learning, data science, or similar roles. A strong understanding of machine learning algorithms, statistical methods, and data structures is essential. Proficiency in Python, along with experience using libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Scikit\\-learn, is required. Candidates should also be familiar with data manipulation and analysis tools like Pandas and NumPy, as well as SQL for working with large datasets. A good grasp of software development practices, including version control systems like Git, is necessary to ensure efficient collaboration and code management.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The Machine Learning Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models and algorithms tailored to business needs. This includes collecting, cleaning, and preprocessing large datasets to ensure high\\-quality training data. The role also involves evaluating model performance and implementing optimizations to improve accuracy, scalability, and efficiency. Collaboration is key; the engineer will work closely with data scientists, software engineers, and product teams to integrate models seamlessly into applications and workflows. Building and maintaining robust data pipelines and ML workflows is essential for operational success. Monitoring models in production, retraining them when necessary, and ensuring their continued effectiveness is a critical aspect of the role. Staying current with the latest advancements in machine learning and AI technologies is vital for continuous improvement. Additionally, documenting processes, models, and findings ensures knowledge sharing and facilitates future development efforts.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At CareerUS Solutions, we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support our employees' well\\-being and professional growth. Our remote work environment provides flexibility, enabling team members to maintain a healthy work\\-life balance. We offer competitive salaries, performance\\-based incentives, and opportunities for career advancement. Our benefits include health insurance coverage, paid time off, and professional development programs such as training workshops and certifications. We promote a collaborative and inclusive culture that values innovation, diversity, and continuous learning. Employees have access to cutting\\-edge tools and resources to excel in their roles and contribute meaningfully to our projects. Additionally, we support flexible working hours to accommodate different time zones and personal commitments, fostering a productive and satisfying work experience.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 CareerUS Solutions is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, national origin, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other protected characteristic. title: Sr. Backend Engineer
description:
Senior Backend Developer at HAAT
 



  





**Location:** 
 Surat / Ahmedabad
 



**Experience Required:** 
 7\\+ years in Software Engineering or a related field Educational Requirement: B.Sc. in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline (preferred)
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 The Senior Backend Engineer will play a critical role in designing, building, and optimizing the backend systems that power our innovative delivery technology solutions. This position involves working closely with cross\\-functional teams, including frontend, DevOps, and data engineering, to deliver scalable, secure, and high\\-performing services.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Backend Development: Design, develop, and maintain robust backend systems using C\\# and .NET Core.
 



 • Database Management: Manage and optimize relational and NoSQL databases for performance and scalability using SQL and MongoDB.
 



 • Search and Caching: Build and maintain efficient search and caching solutions using Elasticsearch and Redis.
 



 • Cloud Infrastructure: Deploy and manage backend services on Azure and GCP, ensuring high availability, reliability, and cost\\-efficiency.
 



 • API Development: Develop and optimize RESTful APIs and gRPC services for seamless communication across microservices and frontend systems.
 



 • Messaging Frameworks: Knowledge of messaging frameworks like GCP PUB/SUB.
 



 • Scalability: Design systems to handle high\\-throughput and low\\-latency requirements, ensuring scalability for growing user demands.
 



 • Code Quality: Write clean, maintainable code with an emphasis on performance, security, and scalability. Conduct code reviews and enforce best practices across the team.
 



 • Collaboration: Work closely with DevOps and data engineering teams to ensure seamless deployment, monitoring, and optimization of backend services.
 



 • Monitoring and Debugging: Implement robust monitoring, logging, and alerting systems to ensure backend stability and quick resolution of issues.
 



  





**Ideal Candidate Qualifications** 




 • 5\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in backend development with C\\# and .NET Core.
 



 • Strong expertise in SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB).
 



 • Experience with Elasticsearch and Redis for search and caching solutions.
 



 Cloud Expertise
 



 • In\\-depth knowledge of cloud platforms, particularly Azure and GCP.
 



 • Proven ability to deploy and maintain backend services in cloud environments.
 



 API Design
 



 • Expertise in designing and developing APIs, including RESTful and gRPC services.
 



 Performance Optimization
 



 • Strong skills in debugging, profiling, and optimizing backend systems for high performance.
 



 Collaboration Skills
 



 • Excellent communication skills and a proven ability to work effectively in cross\\-functional teams.
 



  





 Why Join HAAT?
 



 HAAT is a fast\\-growing startup on a mission to revolutionize delivery technology in cities facing unique infrastructure challenges. We offer innovative tech solutions in a dynamic, fast\\-paced environment that values creativity, problem solving, and resilience.
 



 At HAAT, you’ll be surrounded by talented individuals working together to make a real difference.

description:
